## Editing.ValidatingEditorContext class

Editor context with built-in validating wrapper. Combines EditorContext with EditorContextValidator for convenient access to both pre-validated (base) and raw input (validating) methods. Follows the ValidatingResultMap pattern from ts-utils.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class ValidatingEditorContext<T, TBaseId extends string = string, TId extends string = string> extends EditorContext<T, TBaseId, TId> implements IValidatingEditorContext<T, TBaseId, TId> 
```
**Extends:** [EditorContext](./ts-chocolate.editing.editorcontext.md)<!-- -->&lt;T, TBaseId, TId&gt;

**Implements:** [IValidatingEditorContext](./ts-chocolate.editing.ivalidatingeditorcontext.md)<!-- -->&lt;T, TBaseId, TId&gt;

[IEditorContextValidator](./ts-chocolate.editing.ieditorcontextvalidator.md)<!-- -->&lt;T, TBaseId, TId&gt;


</td><td>

Access validating methods that accept raw input. Methods on this property validate using converters before delegating to base methods.

Usage: - context.create(baseId, entity) - base method, requires pre-validated TBaseId and T - context.validating.create(rawId, rawEntity) - validates string and unknown, then delegates


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
